title: FDIC & FRB-SF Host Hybrid Alaska Community Development Forum in Anchorage
summary: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) and the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco (FRB-SF) are hosting an interagency community development forum in Anchorage, Alaska and via webinar. This hybrid forum will highlight key initiatives supporting small business development, affordable hous...

title: Rain Check Rebate Program Eliminated? Hold that budget axe!
summary: Rain Check Rebate Program Eliminated? Hold that budget axe! md-pg-megan Wed, 2025-04-02 15:18 By Janet Gingold April 1, 2025 As they plan their rain gardens and conservation landscaping projects this spring, some county residents are in for a shock. When they pull up the Chesapeake Bay Trust’s online information about Prince George’s County’s Rain Check Rebate Program , here’s what greets them: NOTICE: In keeping with FY26 budget prioritizations the Rain Check Rebate Program and Stormwater Stewardship Grant Program is proposed to be suspended for FY26, July 1, 2025 – June 31, 2026. Applications for Ra...

title: AST DUI and MICS 5: Wasilla [AK25030356]
summary: On 04/02/2025 at approximately 1605 hours, AST responded to a welfare check near the Three Bears in Wasilla. Investigation revealed that Derick Baisch, age 41, of Anchorage had operated a motor vehicle while being under the influence. He was also in possession of a schedule 2 substance. He was trans...

title: Sales Tax Filing Reminder for Quarter 1: January 1, 2025, through March 31, 2025
summary: Sales Tax Filing Reminder Quarter 1: January 1, 2025, through March 31, 2025 This is a friendly reminder to file your sales tax for the first quarter of 2025, which is due on Wednesday, April 30th, 2025. All mail postmarked by April 30th, 2025, will be considered timely. Please make note of the foll...

title: Temporary Single-Lane Traffic on Heney Bridge
summary: The Heney Bridge is now operating as a single-lane bridge. This change is due to safety concerns, and the Alaska Department of Transportation (DOT) has placed clear signage to indicate the single-lane traffic pattern. Important Information: Single-lane traffic: Please follow all signs and indicators...

title: KUAC Community Advisory Council – Applications are Open
summary: Are you a KUAC devotee? We want to hear from you! Make your voice heard by being part of our Community Advisory Council. If you’d like to be considered, click here to apply »

title: AST Bench Warrant: Seward [AK25020244]
summary: On 03/29/2025, Seward AST located Jason Fosnaugh at a residence in Seward and placed him under arrest for an outstanding $250 dollar bench warrant. Jason was transported to Spring Creek Correctional Center where he was remanded for his warrant.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Deceased Person: Kodiak [AK25028703]
summary: On 03/28/2025 at approximately 13:58 hours, Alaska State Troopers received a report of a Deceased Person. 43 YOA Daniel Nelson Jr. passed away. Initial investigation suggests no foul play was involved. Next of kin was notified. The Medical Examiner has been notified and is requesting the deceased for an exam.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: suggests no foul play was involved

title: AST Theft and Criminal Mischief: Fairbanks [AK25029322]
summary: On 03/30/2025 AST received a report of a cell phone theft. Complainant was able to track the cell phone. AST contacted a female identified as Chrystal Bradley. She was placed under arrest for theft 2 and Criminal Mischief 3.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST SAR: Eureka [AK25029904]
summary: On 04/01/2025, at approximately 1521 hours, Wildlife Troopers received a report that an adult male had crashed his snowmachine and had non-life-threatening injuries but could not self-rescue. The Wildlife Troopers acquired his coordinates (61.76298 N, 147.07162 W). They were located approximately on...

title: AST Deceased Person: Wasilla [AK25029967]
summary: On 04/01/2025 at approximately 1744 hours, AST responded to a residence in Wasilla. The investigation revealed that Dylan Jaskuloski, age 37, of Wasilla, was found deceased. The next of kin has been notified. There were no signs of foul play.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST VCOR: Fox [AK25029899]
summary: On 3/20/25, at 0818 hours, Benjamin Mulberger age 42 of Fox failed to appear at a hearing in Tok. (Review 4TO-22-33CR) Mulberger violated a court order by not obeying a judge's order to attend all court hearings. A summons has be requested in this matter,
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
